---
title: "Tristan Labagala"
subtitle: "Data analytics and research, in R, Python, and SQL."
listing:
  id: work
  contents: projects
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Analytics and research projects spanning econometrics, machine learning, and
data engineering. Each write-up covers the question, the data, the method and
why it was chosen, the findings, and - always - the assumptions it rests on.
Every page links to its full code on GitHub.

::: {#work}
:::
